risinfo.chaptertitle: 7 Non-Preventive Evaluation and Management Services in Outpatient Settings

sect1.title: Non-Preventive Evaluation and Management Services in Outpatient Settings

listitem.para: Identifying evaluation and management (E/M) codes selected on the basis of guidelines for an outpatient site of service
Determining when visit complexity code G2211 is reported
Distinguishing new and established patients, when applicable
Reporting services provided under incident-to policy
Using time in code selection for outpatient E/M services
Selecting codes based on medical decision-making (MDM)
Reporting prolonged or unusual E/M services
